accepted.reason: Logistic loss/gradient with LAVA-style threshold recovery is a strong optimization kernel.
Midside-node relaxation over element edges is a concise geometry update kernel with dense arithmetic loops.
Periodic minimum-image and cell-binning logic are classic simulation acceleration patterns.
3D centroid accumulation over labeled voxels is a high-value nested-loop data-reduction kernel.
Stencil-like convolution loops are direct, high-signal targets for numerical optimization.
Beam-search decoding with blank/non-blank transitions captures useful dynamic-programming style structure.
Nth/last object aggregation per group is a practical table-processing kernel with branch-heavy loops.
Connected/manual state propagation and change-tracking logic is useful agentic runtime control flow data.
Genetic schedule representation with selection/mutation fitness loops adds combinatorial optimization variety.

skipped.reason: Primarily message/reporting and socket/protobuf integration, not a standalone computational kernel.
